_instructions: Copy to evals/evals.json and delete this key. Rules: 'skill' must equal the directory name. 'notes' must document the RED baseline verbatim (what the skill-less agent did wrong — quote it; >=150 chars, must contain the word 'baseline'). One eval per IRON LAW minimum. Each eval: id = kebab-case name of the pressure it applies; prompt = a realistic user message that TEMPTS the agent to violate the law (time pressure, authority, sunk cost, convenience); asserts = >=2 observable behaviors, and at least one assert cites its law as '(IRON LAW n)' — the gate verifies every law number is cited somewhere. Optional 'triggers' block: 6+ should-trigger and 6+ should-not-trigger user queries for description tuning; the near-misses are the valuable ones.
notes: RED-GREEN behavioral evals. RED = the documented {{DATE}} baseline: {{VERBATIM_BASELINE_FAILURES}}. GREEN = with the skill, each failure below is structurally impossible or refused.
